assertions.name: identifies-hardcoded-path-as-crash
assertions.description: Identifies the hardcoded output path as the cause of the crash

assertions.name: shows-unique-path-fix
assertions.description: Provides a fix that generates a unique path per planogram using pog.Name or similar

assertions.name: identifies-unnecessary-savefile
assertions.description: Identifies SaveProjectFile() as unnecessary/harmful on a read-only export operation
